nasb.text: I will also smite the winter house together with the summer house; The houses of ivory will also perish And the great houses will come to an end,” Declares the Lord.

esv.text: I will strike the winter house along with the summer house, and the houses of ivory shall perish, and the great houses shall come to an end,” declares the Lord.

cnv.text: 我必毀壞冬天和夏天的別墅， 用象牙裝飾的房子必破爛， 宏偉的樓宇必歸於無有。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 我要拆毁过冬和避暑的房屋， 捣毁象牙装饰的宫殿， 推倒许多宏伟的楼宇。 这是耶和华说的。”
